name: Rusted Cutting Knife
descs:
When inflicting [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed' with Skill effects against non-Staggered enemies, inflict 1 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Lust, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count instead.

When inflicting [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed' with Skill effects, inflict 2 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Lust, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count instead.

When inflicting [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed' with Skill effects, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency and +1 [Laceration] Count.

If the Skill's Affinity was Lust, inflict 3 [Laceration] Potency and +2 [Laceration] Count instead.
